about.title: About me
about.content:
Senior Frontend Engineer specialized in React and TypeScript with a focus on scalable architecture, performance, and design systems. I build high-traffic web platforms with strong emphasis on maintainability, accessibility, and user experience. Currently working in the travel industry, contributing to system design, frontend architecture, and critical component development.
I aim to grow into technical leadership or frontend architecture roles, driving engineering standards, scalable systems, and high-quality product delivery.

items.subtitle: Senior Frontend Engineer / Technical Coach
items.content: Technical lead at Viajes El Corte Inglés responsible for frontend architecture, design systems, and delivery strategy across flights, hotels, and vacation packages. I lead backlog definition, translate business requirements into scalable technical solutions, and mentor engineers. I drive Design System and Design Token adoption as a single source of truth. I also lead AI-assisted development initiatives integrating Claude and Figma via MCP (Model Context Protocol) to reduce friction between design and implementation. Tech stack includes React, TypeScript, SSR, Vite, Linaria, Sass, pnpm, and Azure DevOps with focus on performance, accessibility, and scalability.
items.title: Viajes El Corte Inglés

items.subtitle: Senior Frontend Developer - Tech Lead
items.content: Worked in a high-scale e-commerce platform in LATAM, evolving from Senior Developer to Acting Tech Lead. Responsible for technical interviews, team mentoring, and frontend architecture decisions. Stack included React, TypeScript, Jest, React Testing Library, Sass, Storybook, and Material UI.
items.title: MercadoLibre

items.subtitle: Semi-Senior Frontend Developer
items.content: Built a platform connecting influencers and brands using React, TypeScript, Context API, Jest, React Testing Library, Sass, and Django backend integration. Worked remotely across Argentina and USA with English communication.
items.title: Cohley

items.subtitle: Semi-Senior Frontend Developer
items.content: Developed telecom client management platform using React, TypeScript, Material UI, Formik, and microservices architecture with Jest and RTL testing.
items.title: GlobalLogic

items.subtitle: Junior Frontend Developer
items.content: Developed institutional portal using Vue.js, Redux, and JavaScript in a distributed team environment between Argentina and USA under Scrum methodology.
items.title: Accenture

items.subtitle: Junior Web Developer
items.content: Developed government systems using jQuery, PHP (Symfony), Ajax, and MySQL for driver license management systems.
items.title: Provincial Government of Buenos Aires
